phase1.title: Phase 1: Scalable Foundation
phase1.description: Core platform development, building basic functionality, hero function for automatic bank statement parsing for business expense management, tested with 5 businesses

phase2.title: Phase 2: Connect and Expand
phase2.description: Increase integrations with other platforms, scale the development team, find CFO partners, initiate marketing, test with altleat 10 businesses and expand to 100 businesses

phase3.title: Phase 3: Revenue Generation
phase3.description: Develop and launch advertising platform, generate revenue from B2B store connections, expand development and marketing teams, expand to 1000 businesses

phase4.title: Phase 4: Regional Leadership
phase4.description: Advanced marketing tools, AI-powered analytics, expansion to other Southeast Asian countries, test with 5000 businesses

phase1.title: Phase 1: Scalable Foundation
phase1.subtitle: Completed Achievement Milestones
phase1.introduction: Phase 1 established the foundation for the Flexi Business Hub platform, delivering core functionality across multiple devices and laying the groundwork for future expansion. Below are the key achievements of this foundational phase:

core.title: Core Platform Development
core.item1: Multi-tier Architecture: Established a robust architecture with separate frontend, backend, and ads management services
core.item2: Cross-platform Functionality: React Native/Expo frontend supporting both mobile apps and web interfaces
core.item3: Internationalization: Implemented i18n for Thai/English language support

business.title: Business Management Features
business.item1: Business Profile Management: Create, edit, and manage business information
business.item2: Multi-store online and offline Support: Framework for managing multiple store locations
business.item3: Inventory: Complete product management system with creation, editing, and listing capabilities

financial.title: Financial Management System
financial.item1: Expense Tracking: Automated expense tracking with PDF upload and categorization
financial.item2: Bill Management: Invoice and billing system for tracking business transactions
financial.item3: Financial Reporting: Basic reporting infrastructure to analyze business performance

technical.title: Technical Infrastructure
technical.item1: Database Architecture: Using Prisma with multiple database schemas
technical.item2: API Organization: Well-structured API layers for different business domains
technical.item3: Secure Communications: SSL certificate configuration for secure data transfer
technical.item4: Containerization: Complete Docker setup with docker-compose for orchestrating multiple services
technical.item5: Nginx Configuration: Proper reverse proxy setup for handling web traffic

user.title: User Experience
user.item1: Onboarding Flow: Landing pages and signup processes
user.item2: Documentation: How-to pages to guide users
user.item3: Legal Compliance: Privacy policy and terms of service pages

development.title: Development Organization
development.item1: Component Structure: Well-organized component hierarchy and reusable UI elements
development.item2: Internationalization: Support for multiple languages built into the system
development.item3: Utility Functions: Common functionality extracted to utility modules
development.item4: Tailwind Integration: Using Tailwind CSS for consistent styling

nextPhase.title: Moving Forward to Phase 2: Market Expansion
nextPhase.description: With the foundation now firmly in place, we're moving into Phase 2, focusing on multi-business support, expanded platform integrations, and reaching a milestone of 500 active users.

phase2.title: Phase 2: Connect and Expand
phase2.subtitle: In Progress - July 2025
phase2.introduction: Phase 2 is all about expanding the Flexi Business Hub platform through key integrations and partnerships. We're building connections with major platforms, scaling our team, and implementing advanced financial management features for multi-business support. Our target is to reach and test with 50 businesses during this phase.

integrations.title: Platform Integrations
integrations.item1: Facebook API: Full integration with Facebook marketing and business APIs for analytics and automation
integrations.item2: TikTok Integration: Connecting with TikTok For Business to synchronize marketing campaigns and tracking
integrations.item3: Shopee Integration: Store connection, product catalog sync, and order management
integrations.item4: LINE Integration: Customer communication and marketing channel integration

team.title: Team Expansion
team.item1: Development Team Scaling: Growing beyond solo development to a small focused team
team.item2: CFO Advisory Partnership: Establishing relationships with financial experts
team.item3: Marketing Team Formation: Starting small-scale marketing initiatives

financial.title: Financial Management
financial.item1: Enhanced CFO Dashboard: Financial analytics and reporting designed for CFO use
financial.item2: Multi-business Financial Tracking: Supporting businesses with multiple revenue streams
financial.item3: Financial Planning Tools: Cash flow projections and budget management

market.title: Market Reach
market.item1: Business Outreach: Testing with 50 businesses across diverse sectors
market.item2: User Feedback Loop: Implementing structured feedback collection and response system
market.item3: Early Adopter Program: Special onboarding for first 100 businesses

technical.title: Technical Scaling
technical.item1: Infrastructure Enhancement: Preparing systems for increased load and users
technical.item2: API Performance Optimization: Ensuring smooth operation with multiple platform integrations
technical.item3: Security Framework Upgrade: Advanced protection for expanded data processing
technical.item4: Database Scaling: Optimizing for multi-business support

marketing.title: Marketing Initiatives
marketing.item1: Brand Positioning: Establishing Flexi Business Hub as the go-to solution for small businesses
marketing.item2: Content Strategy: Educational content about business financial management
marketing.item3: Community Building: Creating forums and events for business owners
marketing.item4: Digital Marketing: Targeted campaigns to reach potential business users

nextPhase.title: Looking Ahead to Phase 3: Revenue Generation
nextPhase.description: Upon completion of Phase 2, we'll transition into Phase 3 where we'll launch our advertising platform, create revenue streams from store connections, and expand our development and marketing teams to support up to 500 businesses.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At Flexi Business Hub, your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

infoCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
infoCollect.description: We collect the following types of data:
infoCollect.personalInfo: Personal Information: Name, email address, login credentials
infoCollect.businessData: Business Data: Sales, expenses, ad costs, financial documents
infoCollect.technicalData: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, device information
infoCollect.cookies: Cookies: Used for analytics, functionality, and security
infoCollect.thirdPartyData: Third-Party Data: Data from Facebook, TikTok, Shopee, LINE (after your consent)

dataUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
dataUse.notify: Notify you of abnormal spending or performance trends
dataUse.assist: Assist with tax preparation and compliance
dataUse.respond: Respond to inquiries and provide customer support

thirdPartyAccess.title: 3. Third-Party Data Access
thirdPartyAccess.description: We access data from third-party platforms only after you grant permission via secure OAuth APIs. This includes:
thirdPartyAccess.revoke: You may revoke this access through the third-party platform at any time.

dataSharing.title: 4. Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.description: We do not sell your personal data. We may share:
dataSharing.providers: Information with trusted service providers under strict confidentiality
dataSharing.legal: Data when required by law or to protect rights and safety

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.active: As long as your account is active
retention.legal: As needed to comply with legal obligations or resolve disputes

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.complaint: File a complaint with a regulatory authority
rights.contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at: support@flexibusinesshub.com

children.title: 7. Children's Privacy
children.description: Our services are not intended for individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

security.title: 8. Security Measures
security.description: We use encryption, access controls, and regular audits to protect your data. While we strive to secure your information, no system is completely secure.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this policy periodically. If changes are significant, we'll notify you by email or through the platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to Flexi Business Hub! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of our software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform and related services. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

overview.title: 1. Overview of Services
overview.description: Flexi Business Hub is a cloud-based platform that automates the collection and analysis of business data including:
overview.adAnalysis: Advertising spend analysis (Facebook, TikTok, Shopee, LINE)
overview.taxTools: Tools to assist with tax submission and optimization

registration.title: 2. Account Registration
registration.description: You must create an account to access the service. You agree to:
registration.responsible: Be responsible for all activity under your account

acceptableUse.title: 3. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.interfere: Interfere with the service or others' use of it
acceptableUse.reverseEngineer: Reverse engineer or attempt unauthorized access to our systems

dataOwnership.title: 4. Your Data and Ownership
dataOwnership.description: You retain all rights to the data you provide or generate through our platform. You grant us a limited license to use this data only for the purposes of:
dataOwnership.insights: Providing insights and analysis to you

thirdParty.title: 5. Third-Party Integrations
thirdParty.description: Our platform connects to third-party platforms (Facebook, TikTok, Shopee, LINE) via their official APIs, and only with your explicit authorization.
thirdParty.rightToAccess: You confirm that you have the right to access and share that data
thirdParty.compliance: You agree to comply with the respective platform's terms
thirdParty.revocation: You understand you can revoke access at any time, though this may limit features
thirdParty.disclaimer: We are not responsible for data accuracy or availability from third-party platforms.

security.title: 6. Data Security and Storage
security.description: We implement security measures to protect your data. However, no system is foolproof. We encourage you to maintain your own backups.

termination.title: 7. Termination and Suspension
termination.description: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. You may terminate your account at any time by contacting support.

disclaimers.title: 8. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability
disclaimers.description: Flexi Business Hub is provided "as is." To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties and are not liable for indirect or consequential damages, including data loss or lost profits.

governingLaw.title: 9. Governing Law
governingLaw.description: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Any disputes shall be resolved in Thai courts.

landing.title:
Minimize Your Task 
Maximize Your Profit
landing.subtitle: The all-in-one business management solution for modern entrepreneurs and growing businesses
landing.description:
Automate your business with our free tools 
 Flexi Business Hub

feature1.title: Smart Financial Dashboard
feature1.description: Get real-time insights into your business performance make data-driven decisions with our AI-powered dashboard. Track sales, expenses, and ad performance all platforms in one place.

feature2.title: Ad Overspend Alerts
feature2.description: Get notified when your ads aren't performing or when budgets exceed expectations

feature3.title: Secure and Reliable
feature3.description: Your data security is our top priority. We use industry-leading encryption and security measures to protect your business information.

feature4.title: Automated Expense Management
feature4.description: Easily manage your business expenses with our automated tools. Upload bank statements, categorize expenses, and generate tax-ready reports.

howto.title: 🔧 How to Integrate
howto.description1: Getting started with Flexi is simple. Register your account and connect your social media platforms.
howto.content2: 2. login your account and consent to access data for each platform
howto.description2: Flexi will Integrate your e-commerce platforms, payment systems, and marketing tools. Our system automatically synchronizes your data across all channels.
howto.content3: 3. Let's start to use Flexi Business Hub
howto.description3: Monitor your business performance through comprehensive dashboards and detailed analytics.Make informed decisions by tracking key metrics, receiving intelligent insights, and utilizing our reporting tools.

vision.title: Our Business Vision
vision.subtitle: To empower small businesses in Southeast Asia with the tools they need to thrive in the digital age. We believe in making advanced business management accessible to everyone, regardless of size or budget.
vision.description1: Empowering businesses with actionable insights to make informed decisions and achieve sustainable growth.
vision.description2: Adapting global best practices while understanding regional market nuances in Southeast Asia.
vision.description3: Building trust through transparent business practices and reliable system performance.

footer.subtitle: Transforming how small businesses manage their finances, track performance, and grow profitably in the digital economy.

taxDoc.vatDesc: If you are a business owner with annual revenue exceeding 1.8 million THB, you must register for Value Added Tax (VAT) with the Revenue Department, pay 7% VAT on your sales, and keep full tax invoice documentation.
taxDoc.annualTaxDesc: You can reduce your tax with a standard expense deduction of 60% without needing to keep receipts. If your actual expenses are higher, you can use actual expenses but must keep all documentation.
taxDoc.taxDocAlert: Document keeping alert: Save more on taxes
taxDoc.carRentalMaxAlert: The Revenue Department allows a maximum expense deduction of 36,000 THB per month per car.

alert.pass: Document meets quality standards of revenue department.
alert.warning: Document quality is missing some requirements. in consideration of the revenue department to accept.
alert.fail: Document quality is below the minimum standard required by the revenue department.
